databaseId.label: Database ID
databaseId.description: The ID of the Recombee Database into which the interactions will be sent.

privateToken.label: Private Token
privateToken.description: The private token for the Recombee Database used.

databaseRegion.label: Database Region
databaseRegion.description: The Recombee cluster where your Database is located. [Learn more](https://docs.recombee.com/regions)

apiUri.label: API URI
apiUri.description: URI of the Recombee API that should be used. *Keep this field empty unless you are calling the Recombee cluster based in a specific region or you were assigned a custom URI by the Recombee Support team.*

addBookmark.title: Add Bookmark
addBookmark.description: Adds a bookmark of the given item made by the given user.
addBookmark.defaultSubscription: type = "track" and event = "Product Added to Wishlist"

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who bookmarked the item.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the bookmark event occurred.

recommId.label: Recommendation ID
recommId.description: The ID of the clicked recommendation (if the bookmark is based on a recommendation request).

internalAdditionalData.label: Internal Additional Data
internalAdditionalData.description: Internal additional data to be stored with the bookmark.

additionalData.label: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data to be stored with the bookmark. *Keep this field empty unless instructed by the Recombee Support team.*

addCartAddition.title: Add Cart Addition
addCartAddition.description: Adds a cart addition of the given item made by the given user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who added the item to the cart.

item.label: Item
item.description: The item that was added to the cart.

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: The amount (number) of the item added to the cart.

price.label: Price (per item)
price.description: The price of the added item. If `amount` is greater than 1, the price of one item should be given.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the cart addition occurred.

recommId.label: Recommendation ID
recommId.description: The ID of the clicked recommendation (if the cart addition is based on a recommendation request).

internalAdditionalData.label: Internal Additional Data
internalAdditionalData.description: Internal additional data to be stored with the cart addition.

additionalData.label: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data to be stored with the cart addition. *Keep this field empty unless instructed by the Recombee Support team.*

addDetailView.title: Add Detail View
addDetailView.description: Adds a detail view of the given item made by the given user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who viewed the item.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the view occurred.

duration.label: Duration
duration.description: The duration of the view in seconds.

recommId.label: Recommendation ID
recommId.description: The ID of the clicked recommendation (if the view is based on a recommendation request).

internalAdditionalData.label: Internal Additional Data
internalAdditionalData.description: Internal additional data to be stored with the view.

additionalData.label: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data to be stored with the view. *Keep this field empty unless instructed by the Recombee Support team.*

addPurchase.title: Add Purchase
addPurchase.description: Adds a purchase of the given item(s) made by the given user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who purchased the item(s).

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: The amount (number) of the item purchased.

price.label: Price (per item)
price.description: The price of the purchased item. If `amount` is greater than 1, the price of one item should be given.

profit.label: Profit (per item)
profit.description: The profit of the purchased item. If `amount` is greater than 1, the profit per one item should be given.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the purchase occurred.

recommId.label: Recommendation ID
recommId.description: The ID of the clicked recommendation (if the purchase is based on a recommendation request).

internalAdditionalData.label: Internal Additional Data
internalAdditionalData.description: Internal additional data to be stored with the purchase.

additionalData.label: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data to be stored with the purchase. *Keep this field empty unless instructed by the Recombee Support team.*

addRating.title: Add Rating
addRating.description: Adds a rating of the given item made by the given user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who submitted the rating.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the rating occurred.

rating.label: Rating
rating.description: The rating of the item rescaled to interval [-1.0,1.0], where -1.0 means the worst rating possible, 0.0 means neutral, and 1.0 means absolutely positive rating. For example, in the case of 5-star evaluations, rating = (numStars-3)/2 formula may be used for the conversion.

recommId.label: Recommendation ID
recommId.description: The ID of the clicked recommendation (if the rating is based on a recommendation request).

internalAdditionalData.label: Internal Additional Data
internalAdditionalData.description: Internal additional data to be stored with the rating.

additionalData.label: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data to be stored with the rating. *Keep this field empty unless instructed by the Recombee Support team.*

deleteBookmark.title: Delete Bookmark
deleteBookmark.description: Deletes a bookmark of the given item made by the given user.
deleteBookmark.defaultSubscription: type = "track" and event = "Product Removed from Wishlist"

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who bookmarked the item.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the bookmark occurred. If the timestamp is omitted, then all the bookmarks with the given `userId` and `itemId` are deleted.

deleteCartAddition.title: Delete Cart Addition
deleteCartAddition.description: Deletes a cart addition of the given item made by the given user.

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who added the item to the cart.

itemId.label: Item ID
itemId.description: The item that was added to the cart.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the cart addition occurred. If the timestamp is omitted, then all the cart additions with the given `userId` and `itemId` are deleted.

mergeUsers.title: Merge Users
mergeUsers.description: Merges interactions (purchases, ratings, bookmarks, detail views, ...) of two different users under a single user ID.

targetUserId.label: Target User ID
targetUserId.description: The ID of the target user that will be **kept** after the merge.

sourceUserId.label: Source User ID
sourceUserId.description: The ID of the source user that will be **deleted** after the merge.

setViewPortion.title: Set View Portion
setViewPortion.description: Sets the viewed portion of a given item (e.g. a video or article) by the given user. **Use this action when you have the viewed portion as a number between 0 and 1.**

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who viewed a portion of the item.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the view portion occurred.

portion.label: Portion
portion.description: The viewed portion of the item as a number in the interval [0.0,1.0], where 0.0 means the user viewed nothing and 1.0 means the full item was viewed. It should be the actual viewed part of the item, no matter the seeking. For example, if the user seeked immediately to half of the item and then viewed 10% of the item, the `portion` should still be `0.1`.

sessionId.label: Session ID
sessionId.description: The ID of the session in which the user viewed the item.

recommId.label: Recommendation ID
recommId.description: The ID of the clicked recommendation (if the view portion is based on a recommendation request).

internalAdditionalData.label: Internal Additional Data
internalAdditionalData.description: Internal additional data to be stored with the view portion.

additionalData.label: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data to be stored with the view portion. *Keep this field empty unless instructed by the Recombee Support team.*

setViewPortionFromWatchTime.title: Set View Portion from Watch Time
setViewPortionFromWatchTime.description: Sets the viewed portion of a given item (e.g. a video or article) by the given user. **Use this action when you have the watch time of the item (e.g. in seconds) instead of the portion watched.**

userId.label: User ID
userId.description: The ID of the user who viewed a portion of the item.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The UTC timestamp of when the view portion occurred.

portion.label: Portion
portion.description: The portion of the item that the user viewed.

totalLength.label: Total Length
totalLength.description: The total length of the item that the user can view (for example, in seconds or minutes).

watchTime.label: Watch Time
watchTime.description: The user's watched time of the item (measured in the same units as Total Length).

sessionId.label: Session ID
sessionId.description: The ID of the session in which the user viewed the item.

recommId.label: Recommendation ID
recommId.description: The ID of the clicked recommendation (if the view portion is based on a recommendation request).

internalAdditionalData.label: Internal Additional Data
internalAdditionalData.description: Internal additional data to be stored with the view portion.

additionalData.label: Additional Data
additionalData.description: Additional data to be stored with the view portion. *Keep this field empty unless instructed by the Recombee Support team.*

presets.name: Ecommerce - Product Added to Wishlist
presets.subscribe: type = "track" and event = "Product Added to Wishlist"

presets.name: Ecommerce - Product Removed from Wishlist
presets.subscribe: type = "track" and event = "Product Removed from Wishlist"
